seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalize the bipartite capacitated assignment into a full generalized-assignment (multiple-knapsack) problem where each group->gallery pair has BOTH a distinct docent-minute cost and a distinct profit, each group is assignable to at most one gallery, and per-gallery capacity must hold; this makes the max-profit assignment NP-hard and lets profit-greedy, density-greedy and local-search strategies diverge.
title: Curator's Conundrum: Docent-Guided Gallery Tours
strategies: single-best baseline: send only the one group->gallery tour with the highest satisfaction
profit-greedy: sort all (group,gallery) tours by profit descending, assign greedily while the group is free and the gallery has budget
density-greedy: sort tours by profit-per-docent-minute descending and pack galleries, then sweep unassigned groups into any remaining capacity
local search: start from density-greedy, then repeatedly apply first-improving adds, moves and swaps that raise total satisfaction
